title: SJMR 50 Boxes of Wax Crayons for Kids- 4 Crayons Per Box, 200 Total - Assorted Colors, Ideal for School, Restaurants, Coloring Activities, and Party Favors
features: 50 Boxes, 200 Total Crayons Get 50 boxes of wax crayons, each containing 4 crayons in an array of vibrant, assorted colors. Perfect for stocking up on supplies for your home, school, or art projects.

Perfect for Kids of All Ages Designed for young hands, the crayons are easy to hold, making them ideal for kids learning to color and draw. Safe, non-toxic, and kid-friendly, they are great for home or classroom use.

Ideal for Restaurants, Schools & Parties These crayons are a must-have for restaurants and cafes offering coloring activities for kids. Perfect for children's menus, school events, and birthday party favors.

Vibrant Assorted Colors Each crayon box contains a rich variety of bright, eye-catching colors, sparking creativity and imagination in children while helping to develop their fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

Convenient and Easy to Store Compact and easy to store, these wax crayons are the perfect party favor and activity supply. Use them for group coloring activities, or simply hand them out at your next event for hours of fun.
description: - Unleash the Creative Potential of Your Child! "200 Crayons, Endless Possibilities!" Coloring is not just fun, it’s a way for kids to express themselves, develop motor skills, and unlock their creativity. The SJMR 50 Boxes of Wax Crayons provide everything your child needs for endless hours of artistic expression. With a total of 200 crayons in 50 compact boxes, this set is perfect for school projects, creative home activities, and as party favors for children’s events. The assorted colors will bring every drawing to life! - Ideal for Schools, Restaurants & Birthday Parties Fun and Functional Coloring for All Ages Whether you’re organizing a birthday party, managing a restaurant’s kids’ menu, or preparing classroom supplies, these crayons are the perfect solution. They are designed for group activities like coloring contests, party games, and craft projects. These crayons are great for restaurant activity kits, providing children with something fun to do while waiting for their meal. At birthday parties, they double as creative party bag fillers, ensuring kids stay entertained, happy, and busy. Teachers and parents alike will appreciate the non-toxic, safe design, making these crayons suitable for young children, even toddlers. - Vibrant Colors for Vibrant Creations Bright, Bold, and Beautiful: Perfect for Every Artwork The SJMR crayon set offers a beautiful variety of colors, making it easy for your child to add a spectrum of shades to their creations. Whether it’s for coloring books, art projects, or free-form creativity, the bold colors will bring every drawing to life. The colors are vibrant, long-lasting, and easy to apply, making them perfect for every artistic endeavor. Kids will love the bright shades that help to create fun and engaging pictures. These crayons make the perfect tool to help your child learn about colors, shapes, and fine motor skills. - Non-Toxic & Kid-Friendly: Safety First Crafted with Care for Safe Playtime The SJMR 50 Boxes of Wax Crayons are made from non-toxic, safe materials, so you don’t have to worry about harmful chemicals. Designed for young hands, these crayons are easy to grip, making them ideal for both toddlers and young children just starting to explore their artistic talents. The BPA-free, safe formula ensures your child can enjoy hours of fun without worry. Perfect for parents, teachers, and daycare providers who want to offer children a safe and educational experience, these crayons allow kids to color freely and explore their creativity. - Versatile and Convenient Packaging Store, Share, and Carry with Ease Each pack contains 50 individual boxes—making these crayons perfectly portable. Whether you’re on a trip, hosting a party, or simply organizing a crafting session at home, the compact design ensures they are easy to carry, store, and distribute. The packaging is ideal for gift bags, party favors, or for keeping in a classroom supply drawer.
